ddls:
CREATE TABLE "change_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the asset that was changed */,
  "kind" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., code, document, configuration) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., U for update, D for delete, M for move) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "new_parent_id" TEXT /* ID of the new parent asset (if the asset was moved) */,
  "old_parent_id" TEXT /* ID of the old parent asset (if the asset was moved) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., comments, changes made) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  "client_info" TEXT /* Information about the client (e.g., browser, device) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction to track multiple changes in a single operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_old_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("old_parent_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_new_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_parent_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., code, document, configuration) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the asset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the asset was last updated */,
  "parent_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent asset (if any) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the asset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the asset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the asset in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the asset to ensure integrity */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the asset was last accessed */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the asset has been accessed */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the asset is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_type FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type") REFERENCES asset_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_until" TEXT /* Date and time until the user is locked out due to failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the asset type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the asset type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the asset type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the asset type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the asset type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the action type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the action type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the asset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "rollback_to_version" INTEGER /* ID of the version to which the asset can be rolled back */,
  "rollback_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rolled back the version */,
  "rollback_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was rolled back */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the asset */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ownership was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ownership (e.g., active, transferred) */,
  "transfer_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom ownership was transferred */,
  "transfer_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ownership was transferred */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ownership transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_owners_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_owners_transfer_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_history_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail record */,
  "history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change history event */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  "is_revertible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the change can be reverted */,
  "reverted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change was reverted */,
  "reverted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reverted the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_history_details_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("history_id") REFERENCES change_history ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_history_details_reverted_by FOREIGN KEY ("reverted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is active */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the comment */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the asset */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is active */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the rating */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_ratings_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_ratings_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the asset */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tag is active */,
  "used_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tag has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tags_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the asset */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the asset was accessed */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the asset */,
  "client_info" TEXT /* Information about the client (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)
